title: Bounded Natural Arithmetic Checks

solver_reuse.target: bounded natural QF_LIA arithmetic-DPLL regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Rejected negative element in the fixed natural domain 0..7 with checked arithmetic-DPLL evidence.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote successor injectivity or zero-not-successor only when a bounded BV/CNF encoding adds distinct fixed-width regression pressure.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed natural arithmetic rows as deterministic QF_BV or QF_LIA.
